articles.title: The browser wars aren't about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari - TechCrunch
articles.description: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.
articles.content: The browser wars have entered a new phase this year: The fight isn’t just over search results anymore it’s over which company’s AI gets to act on your behalf inside the browser. Google Chrome and App… [+8137 chars]

articles.title: Rescue mission launches to save NASA telescope that’s falling back to Earth - AP News
articles.description: A three-armed spacecraft is rushing to the rescue of a NASA telescope that’s in danger of crashing back to Earth. Northrop Grumman launched Katalyst Space Technologies’ Link spacecraft on Friday from the Marshall Islands in the Pacific. The Pegasus rocket bla…
articles.content:
CAPE CANAVERAL, Fla. (AP) A three-armed spacecraft rocketed into orbit Friday to rescue a NASA telescope thats in danger of crashing back to Earth.
